mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.login, u.password, u.enabled, u.created_at, u.updated_at, r.id role_id, r.name role_name FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_roles ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN roles r ON ur.role_id = r.id

SELECT u.id, u.login, u.password, u.enabled, u.created_at, u.updated_at, r.id role_id, r.name role_name FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_roles ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN roles r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE u.login = #{login}

SELECT u.id, u.login, u.password, u.enabled, u.created_at, u.updated_at, r.id role_id, r.name role_name FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_roles ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN roles r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE u.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (login, password, enabled) VALUES (#{login}, #{password}, #{enabled})
